000.evidence: eyes and lifted face clearly point up

045.evidence: face and eyes occupy the up-right quadrant

067.5.evidence: rightward turn strengthens while retaining an upward cue

135.evidence: face remains right and continues down

157.5.evidence: near-down right profile flows toward the approved 180 family

180.evidence: broadly frontal face and eyes point down

202.5.evidence: both eyes remain visible with a slight down-left turn

247.5.evidence: stronger left yaw retains a downward cue

292.5.evidence: left profile begins pitching up and revealing the far eye

315.evidence: both eyes are visible in a clear up-left three-quarter face

337.5.evidence: mostly frontal up-facing pose with a small left cue

continuity.evidence: The ordered loop keeps the same identity, outline style, feet, bib, scale, baseline, horns, and wool construction. Metric warnings correspond to intentional frontal cardinal transitions and transparent space between separated feet, not visible holes or broken attachments.
